hero.title: Technology and peace of mind
hero.description: Software development, consulting on digital solutions, management platforms, and security and smart-home installations. One team to connect what you run in the cloud with what you need on the ground.

services.title: What we do
services.subtitle: Two lines of work you can combine: product engineering and systems for home or business.

software.title: Software development
software.description: Tailored web apps and backends, integrations, and continuous improvement of your systems.

consulting.title: Solution consulting
consulting.description: Support to define architecture, priorities, and your product or platform roadmap.

platforms.title: Management platforms
platforms.description: Process automation and management tools aligned with how you operate.

security.title: Security & smart home
security.description: Alarms, video surveillance, electric fencing, and automation for home or business.

process.title: How we work
process.subtitle: A clear process so you know what to expect at each stage.

step1.title: Discovery
step1.description: We listen to goals, context, and constraints. We define initial scope and risks.

step2.title: Proposal
step2.description: We share options, timelines, and a transparent estimate before moving forward.

step3.title: Delivery
step3.description: Incremental delivery, frequent communication, and support at go-live and beyond.

about.title: About BITFLOW
about.description: A team focused on real outcomes: code, infrastructure, and field work when it matters.
about.paragraph1: BITFLOW brings together software development and security and automation projects for those who need a technical partner close to the work.
about.paragraph2: We work with SMBs, independents, and households that want to modernize operations or strengthen security with serious installations.

cta.title: Have a technical challenge or a project in mind?
cta.description: Tell us where you are and we will reply with concrete next steps.

q1.question: Do you serve only businesses or also homes?
q1.answer: Both. Development and consulting usually target businesses and teams; security and smart home includes residential and commercial installations.

q2.question: How is a software project quoted?
q2.answer: After an initial conversation we define scope, deliverables, and engagement model (project-based or phased). There is no charge for that first assessment.

q3.question: Do you offer maintenance or support afterward?
q3.answer: Yes. We can agree on evolutionary support, monitoring, or visits depending on the solution delivered.

q4.question: Which areas do you cover for security installations?
q4.answer: We align per project. Share location and type of installation in the form and we will confirm availability.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Leave your details and a short summary. We will reply by email or, if you prefer, coordinate via WhatsApp.
contact.name: Name
contact.messagePlaceholder: Describe your need, timeline, or location if relevant.
contact.success: Thank you. We received your message and will get back to you soon.

footer.tagline: Technology solutions, software, and integrated security.
